meta.title: Home | Demo Cafe
meta.description: Demo Cafe — A cozy specialty coffee bar in Tbilisi serving filter coffee, single-origin espresso, and house-made pastries to the morning office crowd. Founder cares about ethically sourced beans and clean minimal aesthetics.
